description: The L&D manager needs to check the department's training spend against the budget for the quarter.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the L&D department's budget for the current fiscal year.

expected_outcome.value: Manager pulls up the approved budget.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of all training-related expenditures for the quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Manager generates a spend report from the financial system.

nodes.task_description: Compare the actual spend to the prorated quarterly budget to determine if they are on track.

expected_outcome.value: Manager calculates the variance and confirms they are currently under budget.
